title: Reduce noisy bridge transport warnings and make bridge lifecycle state clearer
summary: Default MCP logging now suppresses generic rmcp transport warnings while keeping rmcp::service warnings visible. Fresh restart windows no longer emit new benign SSE decode or cancelled-stream warnings from the new binaries.

acceptance.label: Expected bridge reconnect or restart churn no longer produces repeated high-severity transport warnings that look like data corruption or service faults.
Runtime status or logs make it easier to distinguish healthy active bridges from stale or idle long-lived bridge sessions.
